title: M8 closeout and future handoff
summary: Close M8 after all M8 tasks are independently reviewed and integrated, then write a future non-release handoff without executing public release actions.
acceptance: Closes M8 only after all M8 tasks are done, independently reviewed as verified and integrated

Records 1.0 readiness, UI readiness, localization readiness, Web demo verdict, Windows build verdict, completed capabilities, validation matrix, technical debt, cultural review state, privacy/feedback state, save compatibility state and owner gates
Does not execute public release, 1.0 release, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services, public feedback or final public save compatibility commitments
Writes future handoff artifact if appropriate without starting post-M8 work
Runs full closeout gates and pushes verified result to origin/main

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
WM-0126 verified a benchmark stop sign; closeout readiness now depends on WM-0128 performance repair/explanation.

forbiddenPaths: telemetry account paid service or crash upload implementation
final privacy legal or store claims without owner approval
post-M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
